ValidationRule.description: Please enter Closed Reason and Closed Reason Detail for Closed Lost stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, RecordType.Name='Informatics', NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name , 'System Administrator')), ISPICKVAL(StageName,'Closed Lost'), OR(ISPICKVAL(Closed_Reason__c,''), ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_025: Please make sure to fill both Closed Reason and Closed Reason Detail fields for Closed Lost stage.
